nl_query: Identify all scripts where the cached total marks on the answer script row differs from the total marks on the latest active evaluation attempt by more than 0.5 marks, indicating a cache synchronization issue.
failed_sql: SELECT a.id, a.urn, sc.student_id, sc.name, sc.synced_at, SUM(em.marks_awarded) AS marks_sum, (a.total_marks - SUM(em.marks_awarded)) AS discrepancy FROM answer_script a JOIN evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = a.id JOIN student_cache sc ON sc.student_id = a.student_id WHERE a.evaluation_status NOT IN ('SUBMITTED') AND a.is_active = TRUE AND em.is_final = TRUE GROUP BY a.id, a.urn, sc.student_id, sc.name, sc.synced_at HAVING a.total_marks <> SUM(em.marks_awarded) LIMIT 100;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_script.is_active. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
